description_long: This bollard is a robust, cylindrical object with a matte black body and a prominent red cap at the top. The surface of the black cylinder is marked with scattered white scuffs and wear, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty urban use and has been exposed to the elements or frequent contact. The base of the bollard is slightly flared, providing stability and a secure footprint on the ground. The red cap is flat and stands out visually, likely serving as a high-visibility feature for both pedestrians and vehicles. There are no visible chains, connectors, or reflective bands on the exterior. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and durability over decorative elements.
description: A sturdy, matte black cylindrical bollard with a flat, high-visibility red cap and a slightly flared base, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cylindrical black body with a flat red cap and visible white scuff marks, especially near the top and base.
description_view_1: This view highlights additional scuff marks on the black surface and the consistent shape of the red cap.
description_view_2: From this angle, more pronounced white scratches are visible on the side, with the red cap remaining prominent.
description_view_3: This view shows a relatively clean black surface with minor scuffs and the red cap clearly centered.
